arts.ttl: PSG have EXILED a £43m star and already believe Bradley Barcola is the 'new Kylian Mbappe' to lead their new youthful team to glory: Here's why the French champions are a danger to Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: Surprisingly, divested of their last true superstar, they now look better. PSG are unbeaten at the top of Ligue 1, scoring freely, and solid at the back. Mbappe rarely turned up for a defensive shift.

arts.ttl: When Cristiano Ronaldo and Gareth Bale “agreed” to leave Real Madrid in 2013
arts.sum: “The reason is that two weeks earlier he took me to his office and said: ‘Look at those people, they think I’m going to retire, that I’ll be here for another 10 years… but we need to win more Champions Leagues.’” “The reason is that two weeks earlier he took me to his office and said: ‘Look at these people, they think I'm going to retire, that I'm going to be here for another 10 years...

arts.ttl: Lille’s Ethan Mbappé reacts as ‘dream’ of facing brother Kylian in the Champions League dissipates
arts.sum: The Mbappé reunion was on, then off, then back on again, and then, finally, off. Kylian (25) and Ethan (17) Mbappé both spent last year at Paris Saint-Germain. The former…

arts.ttl: Lille - Real Madrid: times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: It was a matchup that threw family loyalties into question as Kylian Mbappé‘s Real Madrid was drawn to play brother Ethan’s Lille in the newly formatted UEFA Champions League. The game between Lille and Real Madrid will be played on Wednesday, 2 October 2024, with kick-off at 3 p.m. ET / 12 p.m. PT.

arts.ttl: The Jefte to Real Madrid prophecy still looks off but he’s Rangers’ beacon of hope and proves Clement’s desire right
arts.sum: The 20-year-old has caught the eye since his summer switch from Fluminense
Anyone who's watched Real Madrid play would not believe they're watching a team that can go unbeaten. Real Madrid are interested in signing Palmeiras CB Vitor Reis.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid deliberately leaking misleading medical information about injured players
arts.sum: There was no shortage of surprise when Real Madrid released their squad list for Wednesday’s Champions League clash with Lille, due to the fact Kylian Mbappe was on it. The French forward had been ruled out for around three weeks with a hamstring issue less than seven days ago, but Mbappe is reportedly in contention […] The post Real Madrid deliberately leaking misleading medical information about injured players appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Euro 2024 winner rejects Arsenal and Liverpool for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Euro 2024 hero Martin Zubimendi has decided that his next club will be Real Madrid - and not Arsenal or Liverpool . The Real Sociedad star decided to snub both Premier League clubs this summer despite initially looking set to depart his boyhood club.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer battle with Real Madrid for teen sensation who fits Mikel Arteta’s plan
arts.sum: Arsenal are pushing to sign Brazilian wonderkid Vitor Reis but are facing intense competition from Real Madrid, Chelsea, Liverpool and Barcelona for his signature

arts.ttl: Liverpool could resurrect interest in €80 million-rated midfield target
arts.sum: Liverpool have been long-term admirers of the Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni. The 24-year-old French defensive midfielder was heavily linked with a move to the Premier League club before he opted to join the Spanish giants.
